case_title: KEITH VEROI VS. ALDO MARTIN MARIN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEROI, KEITH AS TO DEFENDANT MARIN, ALDO MARTIN ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VEROI, KEITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIN, ALDO MARTIN ,AN INDIVIDUAL $5,631.40 PRINCIPAL, $46.91 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,883.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
